issue_summary: Add Javadoc for second method; combine common code.
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Copies the content of a InputStream into an OutputStream
     * 
     * @param input
     *            the InputStream to copy
     * @param output
     *            the target Stream
     * @throws IOException
     *             if the streams are interrupted
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Copies the content of a InputStream into an OutputStream.
     * Uses a default buffer size of 8024 bytes.
     * 
     * @param input
     *            the InputStream to copy
     * @param output
     *            the target Stream
     * @throws IOException
     *             if an error occurs
     */
